fixed_source: m=retry;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=ipow(base:$i64;exp:$i64):$i64{let r=mut.1;lp(let i=0;i<exp;i=i+1){r=r*base};<r};f=main():$i64{let n=s.toint(s.trim(io.readln()));let base=s.toint(s.trim(io.readln()));let mult=s.toint(s.trim(io.readln()));let line=s.trim(io.readln());let succidx=mut.0-1;let cnt=mut.0;let pos=mut.0;let cur=mut.0;lp(let i=0;i<s.len(line);i=i+1){let ch=s.slice(line;i;i+1);if(ch="t"){if(succidx<0){succidx=cnt};cnt=cnt+1};if(ch="f"){cnt=cnt+1}};let delay=mut.0;let done=mut.0;let total=mut.0;lp(let k=1;k<=n;k=k+1){if(done=0){if(k>1){delay=delay+base*ipow(mult;k-2)};let isok=mut.0;if(succidx>=0){if(k-1=succidx){isok=1}};let stat=mut."FAILED";if(isok=1){stat="SUCCESS";done=1};io.println(s.concat(s.concat(s.concat(s.concat("attempt ";s.fromint(k));" at ");s.concat(s.fromint(delay);"ms: "));stat));total=k}};<0;if(done=0){io.println(s.concat(s.concat("FAILED after ";s.fromint(n));" attempts"))};<0}
